Product Details
U-Cups

Hydraulic sealing profiles designed for piston and rod positions with dependable pressure response and wear resistance.

← Back to Product Center

Industrial Product

U-Cups

A practical sealing choice for hydraulic cylinders that need stable sealing, straightforward installation, and long service life.

U-Cups are developed for reciprocating hydraulic applications and can be selected for piston or rod positions according to system pressure, speed, and groove structure.

Hydraulic Pressure Sealing

Delivers dependable sealing performance for standard cylinder applications under working pressure.

Wear Resistance

Suitable for repeated reciprocating motion where sealing lips must balance durability and friction.

Flexible Selection

Can be paired with different compounds and support elements based on media, temperature, and groove design.
